anomalies.message: Three 2024 paper candidates exist. The longest complete combined paper is primary; all alternatives remain provenance and require human comparison.
The independent solution Markdown is byte-identical to the primary combined paper.

Primary paper stem is OCR-damaged. Alternative paper (2024考研数学一真题+答案.md) has clean 4-dim vectors α₁=(a,1,-1,1)ᵀ, α₂=(1,1,b,a)ᵀ, α₃=(1,a,-1,1)ᵀ but vector definitions differ between versions. Requires human review to resolve.

anomalies.message: Source PDF itself visibly writes f'(0)=f'(0) (tautology). Likely intended f(0)=f(1) or f'(0)=f'(1). Retained verbatim; requires mathematical review.
